title: cephaelis guapilensis
intro: Cephaelis guapilensis is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee of the forest due to its caffeine-rich properties. The plant's leaves have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cephaelis guapilensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, Cephaelis guapilensis is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
